outcome_note: Validated upstream HIP path on gfx90a (CDNA2 wave64) + gfx1100 (RDNA3 wave32); upstream targets gfx942/gfx950 only with build-only CI. Carries a contributable build-rot fix (setup.py rocm_extension c++17->c++20: BUILD_WITH_HIP fails on current torch whose <torch/all.h> uses a c++20 requires-clause). gfx1151 blocked by LMCache lacking any Windows host port (POSIX mmap/NUMA/shm), not ROCm. The c++20 fix is PR-worthy.
